purpose: Global model routing registry for STRONGARM Council on GTi15.

hardware_assumption.strategy: one heavy model active at a time; tiny judges and packet routing always on

judgement_cloud_frontier.name: OpenAI GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5 Pro
judgement_cloud_frontier.when_to_use: only when local Judgement confidence is low or task value is high

judgement_cloud_frontier.name: Claude Opus/Sonnet 4.x / Mythos if available
judgement_cloud_frontier.role: long-horizon agent, coding, computer-use, dense writing
judgement_cloud_frontier.when_to_use: large project planning, long codebase audit, elegant writing

judgement_local.name: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinjudgement-2507
judgement_local.fit: excellent for 50-60GB practical ceiling in quantized form

judgement_local.name: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507
judgement_local.fit: good when you need direct outputs instead of reasoning mode

judgement_local.name: Nous Hermes-4.3-36B
judgement_local.role: rebel Judgement / agency / writing / hybrid reasoning
judgement_local.fit: test Q4/Q5 quant; likely near top end of practical local ceiling

judgement_local.name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B
judgement_local.role: raw reasoning / math / logic / hard contradiction solving
judgement_local.fit: strong local reasoner; watch verbosity and loops

micro_judges.name: Qwen3 1.7B / Qwen3 4B
micro_judges.role: cheap judge, router, classifier, STRONGARM packet

training_colab.name: Dolphin or abliterated LoRA experiments
training_colab.role: Misfit style tuning only, not boundary or truth layer

hard_rule: Abliterated models can generate Rebel pressure packets. Mirror and STRONGARM must verify. Judgement decides. Abliterated output never ships raw.
